_comment: Duplicate-entity review for map-combines.json. Walk geocoded-orgs.json in file order, batch_size rows at a time. Criteria: same or clearly matching name AND headquarters within ~8 km (co-located NERC registrations). Seeds that auto-retire via seed-twins.json are skipped. Existing combines live in map-combines.json.

already_handled.reason: Seed twin; NCR00102 is canonical on map (Basin Electric).
Seed retires to NCR00682; NCR01056 and NCR12527 folded in map-combines AEP Columbus HQ group.

reviewed_not_combined.reason: Portland metro co-location (PacifiCorp, PGE, BPA, Avangrid) — distinct legal entities.
Atlanta co-location (Georgia Power vs Southern Company Services) — separate NERC registrations.
Alliant East vs West — different states/HQs (Cedar Rapids vs Madison).
Bowman Wind vs AWAM Bowman — same region, ~24 km apart; different wind projects.

batches.notes: No new map-combine groups needed in batch 1.

combines_added.reason: Same Zenda KS address and EIA project 57787-1; Clearlight platform vs Flat Ridge 2 plant SPV.
Same White SD address and EIA project 61047-wt1; GO + Invenergy GOP at Coyote Ridge.
Same Spearville KS coords; Ironwood GO + DS Cornerstone GOP (Duke/Sumitomo JV operator).
Same Cleghorn IA address; Glacier's Edge GO + EDF Renewable Service GOP.

reviewed_not_combined.reason: Flat Ridge 1/2/3 — related Clearlight portfolio but distinct plant sites (~15–20 km apart).
Frontier Windpower I (Newkirk) vs II (Blackwell) — separate Oklahoma wind projects.
Dairyland Power Cooperative HQ (La Crosse) vs RockGen plant (Cambridge) — separate locations.
Cimarron II vs DS Cornerstone — DS Cornerstone GOP also covers Cimarron II but map pin is at Ironwood only.

batches.notes: Four wind-farm GO/GOP pairs merged; scanner missed three pairs with different legal names but identical plant addresses.

combines_added.reason: Same Marshall TX address and gridinfo plant URL; HCPP GO + NRG GOP.
Prairie Breeze II and III share the same Elgin NE Highway 70 office address.
Golden Spread Panhandle GO + NRG GOP at Wildorado TX (pair spans batch 2/3).
Dogwood Power Management GO + NAES Dogwood GOP at Pleasant Hill MO (pair spans batch 2/3).
Southern Power Company MRO and NPCC registrations share Atlanta HQ.
MEAN MRO and WECC registrations share Lincoln NE HQ.
NorthWestern Corporation and NorthWestern Energy Public Service share Sioux Falls HQ.

reviewed_not_combined.reason: NextEra Energy Resources vs NextEra Energy Transmission Southwest — separate gen and transmission registrations at Juno Beach corporate HQ.
Golden Spread Panhandle vs Spinning Spur — nearby Texas panhandle wind projects (~0.9 km), different owners and EIA records.
Solomon Forks vs East Fork — shared Colby KS coords but distinct wind projects.
Prairie Breeze I vs II/III — phase I site ~12 km from II/III office.
MidAmerican Energy vs BHER Market Operations — co-located Des Moines HQ, distinct legal entities.
Recurrent Energy vs RWE Americas — nearby Austin TX offices, unrelated companies.
Montana-Dakota Utilities vs Nexus Line — nearby Bismarck addresses, separate entities.

batches.notes: Seven combine groups added; three cross-batch plant pairs and three multi-region HQ duplicates discovered via address/URL matching.

combines_added.reason: Same Brooklyn Navy Yard address and bnycogen.com URL; GO + GOP at cogen plant.
Constellation Nuclear and Constellation Power share Kennett Square HQ.
Downeast Wind GO + AWAM GOP at Columbia ME.
Tatanka Wind GO + Invenergy GOP at Ashley ND (pair spans batch 3/4).
Empire Generating GO + NAES Empire GOP at Rensselaer NY (pair spans batch 4/5).
Astoria Energy and Astoria Energy II share 17-10 Steinway Street office.
Bridgeport Harbor and Bridgeport Energy at same harbor station complex (~160 m).

reviewed_not_combined.reason: Astoria Generating Company — separate Astoria peaker ~1.5 km away on 20th Avenue.
Brookfield Power US Asset Management vs TerraForm Power Operating — shared Brookfield NY office, distinct legal entities.
Branscom Solar vs Darby Solar — adjacent Schaghticoke NY sites, different project names.
Transource Midwest vs Evergy — nearby Kansas City MO addresses, separate transmission vs utility HQ.
Central Maine Power vs Maine Electric Power — co-located Augusta ME, separate registrations.

batches.notes: Seven combine groups added; batch 4 is mostly NPCC generation assets with several GO/GOP plant pairs.

pause_note: PAUSE: Batch 4 complete (indices 300–399). Next review starts at geocoded-orgs.json index 400 (NCR10358). Run: node scripts/nerc/review-map-combine-batch.mjs 5
